project_type: TypeScript monorepo with pnpm workspaces - interconnected platform ecosystem
build_system: pnpm@10.28.1 + turbo for orchestration. Each package has its own tsconfig extending root.
test_framework: Vitest ^2 with globals:true. AI package uses vi.mock for external deps. Shared-UI uses jsdom + @testing-library/react.
verification_instructions: 1. Run NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run from workspace root. 2. Check TypeScript strict mode with npx tsc --noEmit in the new package.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install packages from registries. No Docker daemon guaranteed. Node >=22.0.0 available.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits, TypeScript strict, no 'any', Zod for schemas, every new file gets .test.ts
key_patterns: Packages follow: package.json with 'main':'src/index.ts', tsconfig.json extending root, src/ with barrel index.ts. Tests in src/__tests__/ directory. AI package mocks external SDKs in tests. Shared-UI uses React with jsdom vitest environment. Dependencies use workspace:* for internal refs.
directory_structure: Root monorepo: apps/ (frontend apps), packages/ (shared libs like ai, queue, shared-ui, common), services/ (backend services). Each package: src/ with index.ts barrel, __tests__/ for tests, package.json, tsconfig.json.
